query:
SELECT 
  id, sport, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate,
  awayBookSpread, awayBookSpreadOdds,
  homeBookSpread, homeBookSpreadOdds,
  bookTotal, bookOverOdds, bookUnderOdds,
  awayML, homeML,
  awayModelSpread, modelAwaySpreadOdds,
  homeModelSpread, modelHomeSpreadOdds,
  modelTotal, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds,
  modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
  publishedModel
FROM games
WHERE id = 2250006
